title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Nalco Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Nalco Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Nalco Holdings Services in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nalco Holdings Services:
Nalco Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
